examples.text: "Treasure hunters can be naive," says attorney David Concannon, who has had several maritime archaeologists as clients and represented two sides in the battles over the Titanic for 20 years.
examples.explanation: 这里的 maritime 意为“海洋的、海事的”，用来修饰 archaeologists，指从事海洋或水下考古研究的考古学家。

reviewSessions.example_text: "Treasure hunters can be naive," says attorney David Concannon, who has had several maritime archaeologists as clients and represented two sides in the battles over the Titanic for 20 years.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，和参考释义完全一致。
matched_points: 对应“海洋的”这一核心含义
与例句中 maritime archaeologists 的语境相符
